description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a historical military uniform reminiscent of a late 19th or early 20th-century European soldier, likely Prussian or German. He wears a blue tunic with red trim, brass buttons, and a distinctive spiked helmet (Pickelhaube) adorned with a crest. A beige sash is draped diagonally across his chest, and he carries a rolled blanket and a brown backpack on his back, along with several pouches and a canteen attached to his belt. His trousers are blue with red stripes, tucked into tall black boots. The figure's facial features include a mustache, and his hands are relaxed at his sides, giving him a formal, parade-ready appearance.
description: A male adult in a historical European military uniform with a spiked helmet, blue tunic, sash, backpack, and tall boots.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spiked helmet, facial features, blue tunic with red trim, sash, and belt accessories.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the helmet, the rolled blanket, backpack, and side pouches.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full backpack, rolled blanket, and the back of the uniform and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the helmet profile, backpack, and the arrangement of belt accessories.
attribute_clothing_type: historical military uniform with tunic, trousers, sash, and spiked helmet
